2605.12376.title: ProfiliTable: Profiling-Driven Tabular Data Processing via Agentic Workflows
2605.12376.paper_summary: Table processing-including cleaning, transformation, augmentation, and matching-is a foundational yet error-prone stage in real-world data pipelines. While recent LLM-based approaches show promise for automating such tasks, they often struggle in practice due to ambiguous instructions, complex task structures, and the lack of structured feedback, resulting in syntactically correct but semantically flawed code. To address these challenges, we propose ProfiliTable, an autonomous multi-agent framework centered on dynamic profiling, which constructs and iteratively refines a unified execution context through interactive exploration, knowledge-augmented synthesis, and feedback-driven refinement. ProfiliTable integrates (i) a Profiler that performs ReAct-style data exploration to build semantic understanding, (ii) a Generator that retrieves curated operators to synthesize task-aware code, and (iii) an Evaluator-Summarizer loop that injects execution scores and diagnostic insights to enable closed-loop refinement. Extensive experiments on a diverse benchmark covering 18 tabular task types demonstrate that ProfiliTable consistently outperforms strong baselines, particularly in complex multi-step scenarios. These results highlight the critical role of dynamic profiling in reliably translating ambiguous user intents into robust and governance-compliant table transformations.
2605.12376.paper_summary_zh: 表格處理——包括清理、轉換、增強和匹配——是現實世界數據管道中一個基礎但易出錯的階段。雖然最近基於大型語言模型的方法在自動化這類任務方面顯示出潛力，但由於指令模糊、任務結構複雜以及缺乏結構化反饋，它們在實踐中往往面臨困難，導致語法正確但語義有缺陷的代碼。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了ProfiliTable，一個以動態剖析為中心的自主多代理框架，通過互動探索、知識增強合成和反饋驅動的改進來構建和迭代完善統一的執行上下文。ProfiliTable整合了(i) 一個剖析器，執行ReAct風格的數據探索以建立語義理解，(ii) 一個生成器，檢索策劃的操作符以合成任務感知代碼，以及(iii) 一個評估-總結迴路，注入執行分數和診斷見解以實現閉環改進。在涵蓋18種表格任務類型的多樣基準上進行的廣泛實驗顯示，ProfiliTable始終超越強基準，特別是在複雜的多步場景中。這些結果突顯了動態剖析在可靠地將模糊的用戶意圖轉化為穩健且符合治理要求的表格轉換中的關鍵角色。
2605.12376.author: Wei Liu et.al.
2605.12376.authors: Wei Liu, Yang Gu, Xi Yan, Zihan Nan, Beicheng Xu, Keyao Ding, Bin Cui, Wentao Zhang
